attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 EPAPF.APPLICANT_NUMBER,
 EPAPF.ATTRIBUTE1,
 EPAPF.ATTRIBUTE10,
 EPAPF.ATTRIBUTE11,
 EPAPF.ATTRIBUTE12,
 EPAPF.ATTRIBUTE13,
 EPAPF.ATTRIBUTE14,

 EPAPF.ATTRIBUTE20,
 EPAPF.ATTRIBUTE21,
 EPAPF.ATTRIBUTE22,
 EPAPF.ATTRIBUTE23,
 EPAPF.ATTRIBUTE24,
 EPAPF.ATTRIBUTE25,
 EPAPF.ATTRIBUTE3,
 EPAPF.ATTRIBUTE4,

 EPAPF.ATTRIBUTE7,

 EPAPF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE,

 EPAPF.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER,
 EPAPF.EXPENSE_CHECK_SEND_TO_ADDRESS,
 EPAPF.FIRST_NAME,
 EPAPF.FULL_NAME,
 EPAPF.LAST_NAME,
 EPAPF.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 EPAPF.LAST_UPDATED_BY,

 EPAPF.MIDDLE_NAMES,
 EPAPF.NATIONAL_IDENTIFIER,

 EPAPF.ON_MILITARY_SERVICE,
 EPAPF.ORDER_NAME,
 EPAPF.ORIGINAL_DATE_OF_HIRE,
 EPAPF.PARTY_ID,
 EPAPF.PER_INFORMATION_CATEGORY,
 EPAPF.PERSON_ID,
 EPAPF.PERSON_TYPE_ID,
 EPAPF.REGISTERED_DISABLED_FLAG,
 EPAPF.REHIRE_REASON,
 EPAPF.REHIRE_RECOMMENDATION,
 EPAPF.RESUME_EXISTS,
 EPAPF.SECOND_PASSPORT_EXISTS,
 EPAPF.SEX,
 EPAPF.START_DATE,
 EPAPF.TITLE_OF_PERSON,
 EPAPF.WORK_TELEPHONE,
 EPAPF.CMS_REPLICATION_DATE,
 EPAPF.CMS_REPLICATION_NUMBER,
 EPAPF.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
 EPAPF.GLOBAL_NAME,
 'N' SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
FROM
 (
		 SELECT 
		 SMPPF.APPLICANT_NUMBER,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE1,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE10,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE11,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE12,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE13,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE14,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE15,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE16,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE17,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE18,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE19,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE2,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE20,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE21,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE22,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE23,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE24,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE25,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE3,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE4,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE5,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE6,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE7,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE8,
		 SMPPF.ATTRIBUTE9,
		 SMPPF.BACKGROUND_CHECK_STATUS,
		 SMPPF.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID,
		 SMPPF.COMMENT_ID,
		 SMPPF.COORD_BEN_NO_CVG_FLAG,
		 SMPPF.CREATED_BY,
		 SMPPF.CREATION_DATE,
		 SMPPF.CURRENT_APPLICANT_FLAG,
		 SMPPF.CURRENT_EMP_OR_APL_FLAG,
		 SMPPF.CURRENT_EMPLOYEE_FLAG,
		 SMPPF.DATE_OF_BIRTH,
		 SMPPF.DPDNT_VLNTRY_SVCE_FLAG,
		 SMPPF.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,
		 SMPPF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE,
		 SMPPF.EMAIL_ADDRESS,
		 SMPPF.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER,
		 SMPPF.EXPENSE_CHECK_SEND_TO_ADDRESS,
		 SMPPF.FIRST_NAME,
		 SMPPF.FULL_NAME,
		 SMPPF.LAST_NAME,
		 SMPPF.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		 SMPPF.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
		 SMPPF.MARITAL_STATUS,
		 SMPPF.MIDDLE_NAMES,
		 SMPPF.NATIONAL_IDENTIFIER,
		 SMPPF.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,
		 SMPPF.ON_MILITARY_SERVICE,
		 SMPPF.ORDER_NAME,
		 SMPPF.ORIGINAL_DATE_OF_HIRE,
		 SMPPF.PARTY_ID,
		 SMPPF.PER_INFORMATION_CATEGORY,
		 SMPPF.PERSON_ID,
		 SMPPF.PERSON_TYPE_ID,
		 SMPPF.REGISTERED_DISABLED_FLAG,
		 SMPPF.REHIRE_REASON,
		 SMPPF.REHIRE_RECOMMENDATION,
		 SMPPF.RESUME_EXISTS,
		 SMPPF.SECOND_PASSPORT_EXISTS,
		 SMPPF.SEX,
		 SMPPF.START_DATE,
		 SMPPF.TITLE_OF_PERSON,
		 SMPPF.WORK_TELEPHONE,
		 SMPPF.CMS_REPLICATION_DATE,
		 SMPPF.CMS_REPLICATION_NUMBER,
		 SMPPF.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
		 SMPPF.GLOBAL_NAME
		FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_MF_PER_PEOPLE_F SMPPF
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		 SCPPF.APPLICANT_NUMBER,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE1,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE10,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE11,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE12,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE13,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE14,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE15,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE16,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE17,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE18,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE19,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE2,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE20,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE21,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE22,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE23,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE24,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE25,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE3,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE4,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE5,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE6,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE7,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE8,
		 SCPPF.ATTRIBUTE9,
		 SCPPF.BACKGROUND_CHECK_STATUS,
		 SCPPF.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID,
		 SCPPF.COMMENT_ID,
		 SCPPF.COORD_BEN_NO_CVG_FLAG,
		 SCPPF.CREATED_BY,
		 SCPPF.CREATION_DATE,
		 SCPPF.CURRENT_APPLICANT_FLAG,
		 SCPPF.CURRENT_EMP_OR_APL_FLAG,
		 SCPPF.CURRENT_EMPLOYEE_FLAG,
		 SCPPF.DATE_OF_BIRTH,
		 SCPPF.DPDNT_VLNTRY_SVCE_FLAG,
		 SCPPF.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,
		 SCPPF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE,
		 SCPPF.EMAIL_ADDRESS,
		 SCPPF.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER,
		 SCPPF.EXPENSE_CHECK_SEND_TO_ADDRESS,
		 SCPPF.FIRST_NAME,
		 SCPPF.FULL_NAME,
		 SCPPF.LAST_NAME,
		 SCPPF.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		 SCPPF.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
		 SCPPF.MARITAL_STATUS,
		 SCPPF.MIDDLE_NAMES,
		 SCPPF.NATIONAL_IDENTIFIER,
		 SCPPF.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,
		 SCPPF.ON_MILITARY_SERVICE,
		 SCPPF.ORDER_NAME,
		 SCPPF.ORIGINAL_DATE_OF_HIRE,
		 SCPPF.PARTY_ID,
		 SCPPF.PER_INFORMATION_CATEGORY,
		 SCPPF.PERSON_ID,
		 SCPPF.PERSON_TYPE_ID,
		 SCPPF.REGISTERED_DISABLED_FLAG,
		 SCPPF.REHIRE_REASON,
		 SCPPF.REHIRE_RECOMMENDATION,
		 SCPPF.RESUME_EXISTS,
		 SCPPF.SECOND_PASSPORT_EXISTS,
		 SCPPF.SEX,
		 SCPPF.START_DATE,
		 SCPPF.TITLE_OF_PERSON,
		 SCPPF.WORK_TELEPHONE,
		 CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) CMS_REPLICATION_DATE,
		 -999 CMS_REPLICATION_NUMBER,
		 SCPPF.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
		 SCPPF.GES_GLOBAL_NAME
		FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_CG1_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F SCPPF
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		 SOPAPF.APPLICANT_NUMBER,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE1,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE10,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE11,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE12,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE13,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE14,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE15,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE16,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE17,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE18,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE19,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE2,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE20,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE21,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE22,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE23,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE24,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE25,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE3,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE4,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE5,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE6,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE7,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE8,
		 SOPAPF.ATTRIBUTE9,
		 SOPAPF.BACKGROUND_CHECK_STATUS,
		 SOPAPF.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID,
		 SOPAPF.COMMENT_ID,
		 SOPAPF.COORD_BEN_NO_CVG_FLAG,
		 SOPAPF.CREATED_BY,
		 SOPAPF.CREATION_DATE,
		 SOPAPF.CURRENT_APPLICANT_FLAG,
		 SOPAPF.CURRENT_EMP_OR_APL_FLAG,
		 SOPAPF.CURRENT_EMPLOYEE_FLAG,
		 SOPAPF.DATE_OF_BIRTH,
		 SOPAPF.DPDNT_VLNTRY_SVCE_FLAG,
		 SOPAPF.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,
		 SOPAPF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE,
		 SOPAPF.EMAIL_ADDRESS,
		 SOPAPF.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER,
		 SOPAPF.EXPENSE_CHECK_SEND_TO_ADDRESS,
		 SOPAPF.FIRST_NAME,
		 SOPAPF.FULL_NAME,
		 SOPAPF.LAST_NAME,
		 SOPAPF.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		 SOPAPF.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
		 SOPAPF.MARITAL_STATUS,
		 SOPAPF.MIDDLE_NAMES,
		 SOPAPF.NATIONAL_IDENTIFIER,
		 SOPAPF.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,
		 SOPAPF.ON_MILITARY_SERVICE,
		 SOPAPF.ORDER_NAME,
		 SOPAPF.ORIGINAL_DATE_OF_HIRE,
		 SOPAPF.PARTY_ID,
		 SOPAPF.PER_INFORMATION_CATEGORY,
		 SOPAPF.PERSON_ID,
		 SOPAPF.PERSON_TYPE_ID,
		 SOPAPF.REGISTERED_DISABLED_FLAG,
		 SOPAPF.REHIRE_REASON,
		 SOPAPF.REHIRE_RECOMMENDATION,
		 SOPAPF.RESUME_EXISTS,
		 SOPAPF.SECOND_PASSPORT_EXISTS,
		 SOPAPF.SEX,
		 SOPAPF.START_DATE,
		 SOPAPF.TITLE_OF_PERSON,
		 SOPAPF.WORK_TELEPHONE,
		SOPAPF.CMS_REPLICATION_DATE,
		 SOPAPF.CMS_REPLICATION_NUMBER,
		 SOPAPF.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
		 SOPAPF.GLOBAL_NAME
		 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F SOPAPF
		 UNION ALL
		 SELECT
		 SCPAPF.APPLICANT_NUMBER,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE1,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE10,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE11,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE12,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE13,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE14,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE15,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE16,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE17,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE18,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE19,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE2,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE20,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE21,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE22,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE23,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE24,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE25,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE3,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE4,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE5,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE6,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE7,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE8,
		 SCPAPF.ATTRIBUTE9,
		 SCPAPF.BACKGROUND_CHECK_STATUS,
		 SCPAPF.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID,
		 SCPAPF.COMMENT_ID,
		 SCPAPF.COORD_BEN_NO_CVG_FLAG,
		 SCPAPF.CREATED_BY,
		 SCPAPF.CREATION_DATE,
		 SCPAPF.CURRENT_APPLICANT_FLAG,
		 SCPAPF.CURRENT_EMP_OR_APL_FLAG,
		 SCPAPF.CURRENT_EMPLOYEE_FLAG,
		 SCPAPF.DATE_OF_BIRTH,
		 SCPAPF.DPDNT_VLNTRY_SVCE_FLAG,
		 SCPAPF.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,
		 SCPAPF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, 
		 SCPAPF.EMAIL_ADDRESS,
		 SCPAPF.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER,
		 SCPAPF.EXPENSE_CHECK_SEND_TO_ADDRESS,
		 SCPAPF.FIRST_NAME,
		 SCPAPF.FULL_NAME,
		 SCPAPF.LAST_NAME,
		 SCPAPF.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		 SCPAPF.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
		 SCPAPF.MARITAL_STATUS,
		 SCPAPF.MIDDLE_NAMES,
		 SCPAPF.NATIONAL_IDENTIFIER,
		 SCPAPF.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,
		 SCPAPF.ON_MILITARY_SERVICE,
		 SCPAPF.ORDER_NAME,
		 SCPAPF.ORIGINAL_DATE_OF_HIRE,
		 SCPAPF.PARTY_ID,
		 SCPAPF.PER_INFORMATION_CATEGORY,
		 SCPAPF.PERSON_ID,
		 SCPAPF.PERSON_TYPE_ID,
		 SCPAPF.REGISTERED_DISABLED_FLAG,
		 SCPAPF.REHIRE_REASON,
		 SCPAPF.REHIRE_RECOMMENDATION,
		 SCPAPF.RESUME_EXISTS,
		 SCPAPF.SECOND_PASSPORT_EXISTS,
		 SCPAPF.SEX,
		 SCPAPF.START_DATE,
		 SCPAPF.TITLE_CODE TITLE_OF_PERSON,
		 SCPAPF.WORK_TELEPHONE,
		SCPAPF.CMS_REPLICATION_DATE,
		 SCPAPF.CMS_REPLICATION_NUMBER,
		 SCPAPF.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
		 SCPAPF.GLOBAL_NAME
		FROM $$STGDB.ST_COE_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F SCPAPF
		UNION ALL
		SELECT
		CTPAPF.APPLICANT_NUMBER,              
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE1,                    
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE10,                   
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE11,                  
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE12,                  
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE13,                   
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE14,                   
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE15,                   
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE16,                   
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE17,                   
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE18,                   
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE19,                   
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE2 ,                   
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE20,                   
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE21,                   
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE22,                   
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE23,                   
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE24,                   
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE25,                   
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE3,                    
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE4,                  
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE5,                  
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE6,                   
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE7,                    
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE8,                    
		CTPAPF.ATTRIBUTE9 ,                   
		CTPAPF.BACKGROUND_CHECK_STATUS,       
		CTPAPF.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID,              
		CTPAPF.COMMENT_ID,                    
		CTPAPF.COORD_BEN_NO_CVG_FLAG,         
		CTPAPF.CREATED_BY,                    
		CTPAPF.CREATION_DATE,                
		CTPAPF.CURRENT_APPLICANT_FLAG,        
		CTPAPF.CURRENT_EMP_OR_APL_FLAG,       
		CTPAPF.CURRENT_EMPLOYEE_FLAG,
		CTPAPF.DATE_OF_BIRTH,                 
		CTPAPF.DPDNT_VLNTRY_SVCE_FLAG,        
		CTPAPF.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,            
		CTPAPF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE,           
		CTPAPF.EMAIL_ADDRESS,                 
		CTPAPF.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER,               
		CTPAPF.EXPENSE_CHECK_SEND_TO_ADDRESS ,
		CTPAPF.FIRST_NAME,                    
		CTPAPF.FULL_NAME,                     
		CTPAPF.LAST_NAME,                     
		CTPAPF.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,               
		CTPAPF.LAST_UPDATED_BY,              
		CTPAPF.MARITAL_STATUS,                
		CTPAPF.MIDDLE_NAMES,                  
		CTPAPF.NATIONAL_IDENTIFIER,           
		CTPAPF.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,         
		CTPAPF.ON_MILITARY_SERVICE,           
		CTPAPF.ORDER_NAME,                    
		CTPAPF.ORIGINAL_DATE_OF_HIRE,         
		CTPAPF.PARTY_ID,                      
		CTPAPF.PER_INFORMATION_CATEGORY,      
		CTPAPF.PERSON_ID,                     
		CTPAPF.PERSON_TYPE_ID,                
		CTPAPF.REGISTERED_DISABLED_FLAG,      
		CTPAPF.REHIRE_REASON,                 
		CTPAPF.REHIRE_RECOMMENDATION,         
		CTPAPF.RESUME_EXISTS,                 
		CTPAPF.SECOND_PASSPORT_EXISTS,        
		CTPAPF.SEX,                           
		CTPAPF.START_DATE,                    
		CTPAPF.TITLE_CODE TITLE_OF_PERSON,                    
		CTPAPF.WORK_TELEPHONE,                
		CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))  CMS_REPLICATION_DATE,
		-999 CMS_REPLICATION_NUMBER        ,
		CTPAPF.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
		CTPAPF.GLOBAL_NAME
		FROM $$STGDB.ST_CTS_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F CTPAPF     
	 )EPAPF
 WHERE ( EPAPF.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE ,EPAPF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,
	EPAPF.PERSON_ID ,EPAPF.GLOBAL_NAME) 
	NOT IN ( SELECT EFFECTIVE_END_DATE ,EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,
					PERSON_ID ,GLOBAL_NAME
 				 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F )
